ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label of the size (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement in inches */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hips measurement in inches */,
  "bottom_length" REAL /* Bottom length measurement in inches */,
  "size_standard" TEXT /* Standard size system (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "thigh" REAL /* Thigh measurement in inches */,
  "calf" REAL /* Calf measurement in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "fabric_type" TEXT /* Type of fabric used in the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the product is designed for (e.g., Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the product is designed for (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Tops, Bottoms) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in inventory */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Size ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity available in the inventory */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level to trigger a reorder */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the warehouse manager */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse in terms of number of items */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of warehouse (e.g., distribution, storage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier from whom the order is placed */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated purchase order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product included in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity sold in the transaction */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product was sold from */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "total_sale_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return transaction */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated sale transaction */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., inventory manager, sales associate) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed (e.g., login, update inventory) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse being audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "total_items" INTEGER /* Total number of items audited */,
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the audit */,
  "discrepancies" TEXT /* Description of any discrepancies found */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_audits_auditor_id FOREIGN KEY ("auditor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_audits_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)
